title: Charity bingo evening for Odin tomorrow
description: GEORGE NEWS - Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need (Odin)...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need (Odin) will be hosting their annual Christmas charity bingo evening tomorrow night, Friday 22 November at the George Golf Club.


> The fun starts at 18:30 for 19:00 and R230 includes your bingo booklet, a donation towards Odin and a meal.


On the menu is chicken schnitzel with a cheese sauce, potato wedges and a salad.

A cash bar will be available and all proceeds will go to Odin.For more information, or to book, please contact Joey on 082 646 8537 or Marelize on 044 873 6116 / [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
